title: Support  - App page Cancel
scenario: Tapping Cancel (X) button on the App page in the Support section dismisses the screen and returns to the Support main screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Account section.
5. Tap on any option or link to navigate to a sub-page within the Support section (e.g., FAQ, Contact Us, etc.).
6. Tap the Cancel (X) button located on the sub-page.
expected: The sub-page is dismissed and the user is returned to the Support first screen (main Support menu).
